name: GPT 5.6 Luna
description: GPT 5.6 Luna is OpenAI's preview fast and affordable GPT-5.6 model for lower-latency and cost-sensitive workloads.

details.name: availability
details.value: Limited preview in the API and Codex for select trusted partners; broader availability planned in the coming weeks.

details.name: prompt_caching
details.value: Supports explicit cache breakpoints and a 30-minute minimum cache life during preview.
